text: As I step inside, the glass walls and shifting colors lend a feeling of being both included and separated, as if I’m peering into a laboratory of ideas. The R+D wall, with its bold letters and explanatory text, draws my attention. I notice the words on the screen describing a sense of drifting, detachment, and anticipation. I can relate—the glow of the monitors and the calculated design of the space make me conscious of my own presence as an observer, not yet fully immersed but wondering what I will discover here. There is a lingering curiosity, tinged with mild uncertainty, about what lies ahead.
